name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, you!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Move over. I need to wash myself too."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, but... there's only one seat."

name: Hasaki
message: "I'll just sit on the floor, then."
Wh-What's going on here?

name: Tomosane
message: "M-Maybe I should get out now..."

name: Hasaki
message: "You haven't washed yourself at all."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, I just like to take quick baths is all."

name: Yuki
message: "I like to take long ones."

name: Hasaki
message: "See?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki, why'd you say that?!"

name: Yuki
message: "What's it matter? You're not turned on by your little sister, now are you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "It's not a problem of getting turned on or not!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Then what's the problem?"

name: Yuki
message: "Come on, let's just wash and get it over with. You haven't washed your hair yet, either."
Jeez... Maybe Yuki doesn't mind because she's a woman, but...

name: Yuki
message: "What? You can't control yourself when she's sitting right beside you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-Yuki!"

name: Yuki
message: "You don't think of Hasaki-chan as just a sister, do you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course I do!"

name: Yuki
message: "Really?"

name: Yuki
message: "You really do treat her like your sister only when it's convenient, just like she said."

name: Tomosane
message: "Shut it!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Are you talking to Yuki-san in secret again?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I-It's not a s-secret or anything important like that!"

name: Yuki
message: "Really? It's not important how you think of Hasaki-chan?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, that probably isn't important to Tomo Nii-san at all."

name: Tomosane
message: "Th-That's not what I meant."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, now you made Hasaki-chan mad again, Tomosane."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's your fault!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Haa... I don't care anymore."

name: Tomosane
message: "Okay, I'm getting out now!"

name: Yuki
message: "Wait a second. You have to use conditioner too!"

name: Tomosane
message: "What the hell is that?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, was this yours, Yuki-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right."

name: Hasaki
message: "Is that a good brand?"

name: Yuki
message: "I think so. It had good reviews online."

name: Hasaki
message: "It must be really expensive."

name: Yuki
message: "Wanna try it?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Can I?"

name: Yuki
message: "Sure, I don't mind."

name: Tomosane
message: "Who cares about that? Let me get out of here already!"

name: Hasaki
message: "I care. Be quiet, Tomo Nii-san."

name: Hasaki
message: "How much of this should I use? Especially this tube of treatment."

name: Yuki
message: "Do you want me to do it for you?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Are you dumb? You and I look the same to Hasaki. There's no way she's okay with that."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yuki-san, would you?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, sure."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why are you ignoring me? Why are you saying yes?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "You're awfully annoying, Tomo Nii-san. Don't butt into our conversation, please."
Yuki circled around behind Hasaki.
Well, I guess it's better this way since I don't have to worry about seeing anything I shouldn't.

name: Yuki
message: "This should be enough conditioner for your hair, I think."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, that's about how much shampoo I use, too."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, it's about as thick as normal shampoo, so I'm not surprised."

name: Hasaki
message: "All right, will you please?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah."

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah?! Wh-What?!"
When Yuki's fingers touched Hasaki's head, my fingers caressed her hair.

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-Yuki, what are you―"

name: Yuki
message: "Come on, brothers and sisters should get along once in a while. Now put about a finger-sized bit of treatment in your palm and rub it on evenly."

name: Tomosane
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Yuki
message: "Good night. I'm tired, so I'm gonna dip out."

name: Tomosane
message: "What do you mean, dip out? You can't log out now."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey!"

name: Hasaki
message: "What?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yes?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki disappeared."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, it's nothing unusual, but..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Which means, right now..."

name: Tomosane
message: "The two of us are alone."

name: Hasaki
message: "Alone!"
Hasaki suddenly blushed when she heard that word.
No, that doesn't make sense. From her viewpoint, it's just been the two of us from the beginning.
But I couldn't say that. I wavered for a moment.

name: Tomosane
message: "U-Um, I don't know how to put on the treatment, so maybe I should just get out now."

name: Tomosane
message: "U-Um, I kind of went along with it when Yuki was around, but we really shouldn't be doing this."
To be honest, it was bad even when Yuki was around. Yuki just dragged me along with her stupidity, and Hasaki was too stubborn to stop.

name: Tomosane
message: "Ahahaha... I'll get out."
When I tried to stand up, Hasaki grabbed my arm.

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Finish what you started."
What I started...

name: Tomosane
message: "Wait, I don't understand what you mean!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Um, I already closed my eyes. I can't open them now."
She closed her eyes, so she can't open them now? That doesn't really make sense.
I guess there are a lot of shampoos out there that sting if you get them in your eyes.
But...

name: Tomosane
message: "No, but..."

name: Hasaki
message: "I-I'm just your little sister, after all. What's the problem? And besides, you already saw me naked..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, uh... For the record, I did my best to not look."

name: Hasaki
message: "Th-Then keep doing your best and it'll be fine."
It won't be fine at all.
Yeah, this doesn't even make sense anymore. Why am I taking a bath with Hasaki, and why do I have to wash her hair?
Besides...
Truthfully, I shouldn't be alone with Hasaki like this.
Even if she is my sister, two people of our age can't be naked and alone together.

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-Yeah..."
At Hasaki's urging, I continued to apply the conditioner and other hair products to Hasaki's scalp.
Sadly enough, it was a lot easier than I expected once I got started. Yuki's experience was still in my body.

name: Hasaki
message: "Ahahaha... You're pretty good at this, Tomo Nii-san. Have you done this for Yuki-san before?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No. That's never happened, ever. We share the same body, so I have most of the same skills and experiences that she does."

name: Hasaki
message: "I see."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, and Mamiya Takuji should be able to do everything that we can do."

name: Hasaki
message: "Hmm... Then you know how to put on the treatment too."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, wait!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Please put on the treatment too."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?!"
Hasaki grabbed my hand.
Her hand was small, soft... and very warm.
And it was...
Trembling.

name: Tomosane
message: "What's wrong, Hasaki?"

name: Hasaki
message: "No, it's nothing..."
I knew right away that Hasaki was crying.
Not from her voice.
And of course, I couldn't see her face from behind...
But somehow, I knew right away that Hasaki was crying.

name: Hasaki
message: "I think I know... why you always push me away, Tomo Nii-san."

name: Hasaki
message: "But that's selfish."

name: Hasaki
message: "You think that if you push me away, we won't ever grow closer... but you're wrong."
She didn't say it directly.
But I could tell she was blaming me.
She didn't blame me because I was going to disappear, but rather, because I pushed her away to avoid growing closer to her.
No, because I tried to avoid growing closer to her... but still did.

name: Hasaki
message: "I don't know... what will happen to you or Yuki in the future."

name: Hasaki
message: "Even if I did know... there's nothing I can do about it."

name: Hasaki
message: "But there is something I do know for sure..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki..."

name: Hasaki
message: "The treatment!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "At least do that for me. Th-This is really embarrassing, you know!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? E-Embarrassing?"

name: Hasaki
message: "O-Of course it is!"

name: Tomosane
message: "B-But you were the one who came barging in, and you took off your swimsuit..."

name: Hasaki
message: "B-But that was... Oh, shut up! Sometimes a girl has to do things that are embarrassing!"
She fiercely spat out those words.
A girl has to do things that are embarrassing... Is that true?
I don't really understand, but I think that might be true.

name: Hasaki
message: "Wh-What kind of person wouldn't be embarrassed about being seen naked?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Uh, an exhibitionist, maybe?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Don't lump me in with those people!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, uh... Sorry."
Uh... Somehow we're getting off topic.

name: Hasaki
message: "Did you think I wasn't embarrassed about this?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Then why did you do it?"

name: Hasaki
message: "I-I told you, sometimes you have to do things like this. That's why. Um... It's kind of like how sometimes a nuclear meltdown can happen even when it's supposed to be impossible for the reactor to malfunction! It's just like that!"
No, uh... I don't think it's like that at all.

name: Hasaki
message: "Anyway, you can wash out the conditioner now."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, sure..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Ahhh... That feels good... Wow, my hair is so soft."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah..."
When the conditioner was in her hair, it felt nice and slippery, but once I washed the conditioner out it changed to a soft, silky feeling.
Ooh... This is totally different from the feeling of a guy's hair. Or maybe that's because she's still so young?
She looks a lot younger than she actually is.
That must be because of her Mamiya blood.

name: Hasaki
message: "Keep going."

name: Tomosane
message: "A-All right..."
There was no point resisting at this point. I put a little bit in my palm just like Yuki told me and rubbed it into Hasaki's hair.
This "treatment" stuff was more viscous than shampoo or conditioner, like paste.

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah... It feels funny."

name: Tomosane
message: "This is designed for use on people's hair, right? It kind of reminds me of something else."

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, that's because it comes in a tube. It's different from the shampoo or conditioner."

name: Tomosane
message: "What do you usually use, Hasaki?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Hm? Probably the same thing you use. Just shampoo and conditioner. I've been interested in these bottles in the bathroom for a while now, but I never knew how to use the treatment or anything like that."

It was just like the shampoo and conditioner, but someone who didn't know that might have thought it was supposed to go on your face. Makeup remover has about the same consistency as this stuff, I think.

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm gonna rinse it out now."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Already?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, you're supposed to wash this out right away."
I gently rinsed the treatment out of her hair.
It says that I can just wash it out like normal, but apparently it can cause a rash if someone has weak skin, so I was extra careful as I rinsed her hair with water.
After it all rinsed out, her hair was even softer than before.

name: Hasaki
message: "Wow, this is amazing!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... Good for you."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah!"
Hasaki cheerfully turned toward me.
And because of where I was standing, she turned to face my...

name: Hasaki
message: "Ah―"
I could tell she was about to scream, and I prepared myself in case she was about to hit me in a very delicate area.

name: Tomosane
message: "H-Hasaki!"
Hasaki fainted on the spot.
